rulings.Case Title: ALAN HONNIBALL VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Cyprexx Services Llc'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 6, 2011, line 1. Defendant Cyprexx Services LLC's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint. Sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TONY CHOU et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Regarding Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 6, 2011, line 2. Plaintiffs Tony Chou and Min Ying Liang's Order to show cause regarding preliminary injunction. Deny. 1) CCC 2923.5 not applicable. Limited to 1/1/03 to 12/31/07. 2) No possibility of success. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JONG B. LEE VS. CATHERINE J. KOSTLAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 6, 2011, line 3. Plaintiff Jong B. Lee's Motion for Summary Judgment. Continued to 1/9/12 for status re bankruptcy. (501/REQ)
Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 6, 2011, line 4. Defendant Aaron Barclay's demurrer to complaint. Off Calendar. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OTR, AN OHIO GENERAL PARTNERSHIP, AS NOMINEE OF VS. BRENT W. COON, A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Costs
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 6, 2011, line 5. Plaintiff OTR's motion to strike costs. Off Calendar per moving party. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. LUCILA MEDINA-GONZALEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 6, 2011, line 6. Defendant Tony Martinez' motion to quash service of summons or stay or dismiss. Deny. Three (3) day notice to perform or quit is proper; and defendant is party per claim of right to possession. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD RESMA VS. ANDREW H RAGLAND et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 6, 2011, line 7. Defendant Andrew Ragland's demurrer to first amended complaint. No opposition filed. Sustained with leave to amend to comply with CCP 1166(c)(1)(A). (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TROPHY PROPERTIES XV, LLC VS. VALENTINE CASE et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 6, 2011, line 8. Defendant Velvet Valentine's demurrer to complaint. Overruled. 5 days to answer; per CCP 1161(4). (501/REQ)
